prompt: Adjust the scale of each planet in the source image to reflect the relative proportions depicted in the reference image.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1 (the source image). Rescale each planet within image 1, including Mercury, Venus, Earth, Mars, Jupiter, Saturn, Uranus, and Neptune. The new scale for each planet must accurately reflect the relative proportions of the corresponding planets as depicted in image 2 (the reference image). Ensure the final edited image maintains its photorealistic style.
